title: List of MFA Methods Used with UPN Details
description: Enumerates all MFA methods in use across the tenant from SigninLogs, with user UPN details for each method.
author: Nathan Hutchinson
content:
// Title: List of MFA Methods Used with UPN Details
// Author: Nathan Hutchinson
// Source: https://www.kqlsearch.com
// KQL Library - https://github.com/sivolko/kql-hunter
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where ResultType == "0"
| where isnotempty(AuthenticationDetails)
| mv-expand AuthStep = parse_json(AuthenticationDetails)
| extend MFAMethod = tostring(AuthStep.authenticationMethod)
| extend MFAResult = tostring(AuthStep.succeeded)
| where MFAMethod != "Previously satisfied"
| where MFAResult == "true"
| summarize UserCount = dcount(UserPrincipalName), Users = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 10) by MFAMethod
| order by UserCount desc

title: MDXDR Critical Assets
description: Identifies critical assets in Microsoft Defender XDR using ExposureGraphNodes and IdentityInfo, highlighting high-value targets.
author: Alex Verboon
content:
// Title: MDXDR Critical Assets
// Author: Alex Verboon
// Source: https://www.kqlsearch.com
// KQL Library - https://github.com/sivolko/kql-hunter
ExposureGraphNodes
| where NodeLabel == "device"
| extend CriticalityLevel = tostring(NodeProperties.rawData.criticalityLevel)
| where CriticalityLevel in ("Critical", "High")
| extend AssetName = tostring(NodeProperties.rawData.displayName)
| extend OS = tostring(NodeProperties.rawData.operatingSystemPlatform)
| extend ExposureScore = todouble(NodeProperties.rawData.exposureScore)
| join kind=leftouter (IdentityInfo | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated,*) by AccountObjectId | project AccountObjectId, AccountUpn, JobTitle, Department) on $left.NodeId == $right.AccountObjectId
| project AssetName, CriticalityLevel, OS, ExposureScore, AccountUpn, Department
| order by ExposureScore desc

title: Defender RedSun: TieringEngineService Created in AppData
description: Detects the RedSun TieringEngineService binary being created in AppData, a known indicator of the RedSun malware loader.
author: Jay Kerai

title: Suspicious Device Code Authentication
description: Detects suspicious device code authentication flows across SigninLogs, AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs, and ADFSSignInLogs that may indicate device code phishing.
author: Jose Sebastian Canos

title: Users Authenticating with the MFA Companion App
description: Identifies users signing in using the Microsoft Authenticator Companion app, useful for auditing non-standard MFA methods.
author: Nathan Hutchinson

title: Overview of All MFA Methods in Use
description: Provides a tenant-wide overview of all MFA authentication methods in use, with counts per method.
author: Nathan Hutchinson
content:
// Title: Overview of All MFA Methods in Use
// Author: Nathan Hutchinson
// Source: https://www.kqlsearch.com
// KQL Library - https://github.com/sivolko/kql-hunter
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where ResultType == "0"
| where isnotempty(AuthenticationDetails)
| mv-expand AuthStep = parse_json(AuthenticationDetails)
| extend MFAMethod = tostring(AuthStep.authenticationMethod)
| extend MFASucceeded = tostring(AuthStep.succeeded)
| where MFAMethod !in ("Previously satisfied", "Password")
| summarize
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    TotalSignIns = count(),
    SuccessRate = countif(MFASucceeded == "true") * 100 / count()
    by MFAMethod
| order by UniqueUsers desc

title: Suspicious 0-Day Adobe Reader Process Activity
description: Detects suspicious network connections and file writes by Adobe Reader processes, indicative of a potential zero-day exploitation attempt.
author: Benjamin Zulliger
content:
// Title: Suspicious 0-Day Adobe Reader Process Activity
// Author: Benjamin Zulliger
// Source: https://www.kqlsearch.com
// MITRE: T1203 - Exploitation for Client Execution
// KQL Library - https://github.com/sivolko/kql-hunter
let AdobeProcesses = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName in~ ("AcroRd32.exe", "Acrobat.exe", "AdobeARM.exe")
| project DeviceId, DeviceName, AdobePID = ProcessId, AdobeTime = Timestamp;
let SuspiciousNetwork = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("AcroRd32.exe", "Acrobat.exe")
| where not(ipv4_is_private(RemoteIP))
| where RemotePort !in (80, 443)
| project DeviceId, NetTime = Timestamp, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl;
let SuspiciousFiles = DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("AcroRd32.exe", "Acrobat.exe")
| where FolderPath has_any ("Temp", "AppData", "Downloads")
| where FileName endswith_any (".exe", ".dll", ".ps1", ".bat")
| project DeviceId, FileTime = Timestamp, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256;
AdobeProcesses
| join kind=inner SuspiciousNetwork on DeviceId
| join kind=inner SuspiciousFiles on DeviceId
| where NetTime between (AdobeTime .. AdobeTime + 5m)
| where FileTime between (AdobeTime .. AdobeTime + 5m)
| project DeviceName, AdobeTime, RemoteIP, RemotePort, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256
| order by AdobeTime desc

title: Detect TLS Validation Bypass via PowerShell
description: Detects PowerShell commands that disable TLS certificate validation, a common technique used by malware to bypass SSL inspection.
author: Sergio Albea

title: Audit Claude AI Behavior on Endpoints
description: Detects process execution and file activity patterns associated with Claude AI (Anthropic) running on endpoints, for auditing AI tool usage.
author: Benjamin Zulliger

title: Git Force Push Detection
description: Detects git force push commands on endpoints, which can be used to rewrite repository history and cover tracks.
author: Ali Hussein

title: Git Commit --amend --no-verify Detection
description: Detects git commit amendment with the --no-verify flag, which bypasses pre-commit hooks and may be used to sneak in malicious code.
author: Ali Hussein

title: Batch Git Abuse Detection
description: Detects execution of multiple git abuse techniques in batch (cmd.exe or scripts) within a short time window on the same device.
author: Ali Hussein

title: Defense Evasion: Git Time Change
description: Detects system time changes occurring shortly before or after git commit activity, which may indicate an attempt to falsify commit timestamps.
author: Ali Hussein

title: Defense Evasion: Git Config Masquerade
description: Detects git config changes to user.name or user.email that may be used to masquerade as another developer when making commits.
author: Ali Hussein

title: Correlation: Git and VS Code Task Abuse
description: Correlates git abuse commands launched from VS Code tasks, which may indicate malicious use of IDE automation for supply chain tampering.
author: Ali Hussein

title: IFEO: Unauthorized Debugger Registration
description: Detects Image File Execution Options (IFEO) registry modifications that register unexpected debuggers, a common persistence and privilege escalation technique.
author: Benjamin Zulliger

title: macOS: Suspicious Shell or Process Execution from Browser
description: Detects shell or direct process spawning from browser processes on macOS, which may indicate exploitation of a browser vulnerability.
author: Benjamin Zulliger

title: Device TVM Secure Configuration Assessment Summary
description: Summarizes the Threat and Vulnerability Management (TVM) secure configuration assessment results per device, highlighting non-compliant configurations.
author: Benjamin Zulliger
content:
// Title: Device TVM Secure Configuration Assessment Summary
// Author: Benjamin Zulliger
// Source: https://www.kqlsearch.com
// KQL Library - https://github.com/sivolko/kql-hunter
DeviceTvmSecureConfigurationAssessment
| where Timestamp > ago(1d)
| where IsCompliant == false
| join kind=leftouter (DeviceTvmSecureConfigurationAssessmentKB | project ConfigurationId, ConfigurationName, ConfigurationDescription, RiskDescription, Tags)
    on ConfigurationId
| summarize
    FailedConfigs = dcount(ConfigurationId),
    FailedConfigNames = make_set(ConfigurationName, 10),
    HighRiskCount = countif(Tags has "high")
    by DeviceId, DeviceName
| order by FailedConfigs desc

title: Node C2 Polinder Detection
description: Detects suspicious outbound network connections from Node.js processes that may indicate C2 communication via a polinder-style payload.
author: Ali Hussein

title: Microsoft Defender Cloud App Discovery to Log Analytics
description: Exports Microsoft Defender Cloud App Discovery data to a custom Log Analytics table for extended retention and custom alerting.
author: Benjamin Zulliger
